pi_items.source: Task description (line 5) and setup_task.sh (line 17) both specify this exact path
Verifier.py line 102 accepts range 14000 <= volume <= 18000, contradicting metadata claim of min 14500
Verifier.py line 102 accepts range 14000 <= volume <= 18000, contradicting metadata claim of max 17500
Verifier.py line 88 uses tolerance of 3.0mm: 'if abs(d - e) > 3.0:', not 2.0mm as claimed in metadata
Verifier.py line 58 checks for 'Rib' in obj.TypeId; scoring requires has_rib=True for passing (line 128)

privileged_info_summary: The design_ribbed_bracket task is a synthetic task where users create a ribbed L-shaped bracket in FreeCAD. Expected output is /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/ribbed_bracket.FCStd. The part must include a PartDesign::Rib feature (verified). Volume calculation is based on L-profile (50x30x5 + 45x30x5 = 14250 mm³) plus triangular rib (1800 mm³) for ~16050 mm³ total. Bounding box dimensions are 50x50x30mm. CRITICAL DISCREPANCIES: The verifier actually accepts volume range 14000-18000 (not 14500-17500), and uses 3.0mm bbox tolerance (not 2.0mm as claimed in metadata).
